ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the employee */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the employee is based */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the employee */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax amount deducted from the employee's salary */,
  "percent" REAL /* Performance percentage of the employee */,
  "birthday" TEXT /* Birthday of the employee */,
  "register_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the employee was registered */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the employee's record was last updated */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current department the employee belongs to */,
  "job_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current job role the employee holds */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_job_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_role_id") REFERENCES job_roles ("job_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_roles" (
  "job_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job role */,
  "job_role_name" TEXT /* Name of the job role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job role */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the job role belongs to */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the job role */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Brief description of the job responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_departments" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the employee belongs to */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the employee joined the department */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the employee left the department (if applicable) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held by the employee in the department */,
  "reason_for_leaving" TEXT /* Reason for the employee leaving the department (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_job_roles" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "job_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job role the employee has held */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started in the job role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the employee ended in the job role (if applicable) */,
  "reason_for_ending" TEXT /* Reason for the employee ending the job role (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "job_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was conducted */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the employee (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_comments" TEXT /* Detailed comments from the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee receiving the benefit */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit (e.g., health insurance, retirement plan) */,
  "benefit_amount" REAL /* Amount of the benefit */,
  "benefit_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of benefit */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the benefit started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the benefit ended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_records" (
  "tax_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "tax_year" INTEGER /* Year the tax was paid */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Amount of tax paid */,
  "tax_type" TEXT /* Type of tax (e.g., income tax, property tax) */,
  "tax_period" TEXT /* Tax period (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_records_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_records" (
  "file_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., school record, employment contract) */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file */,
  "file_date" TEXT /* Date the file was created or uploaded */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_records_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
